cases.prompt: 한국 웹 서비스에 PortOne으로 간편결제 구독 시스템 붙여줘.

assertions.text: Selects PortOne (Toss/Kakao/Naver 간편결제) for the Korea web target per the provider decision tree
Implements the subscriptions/payments schema and the trialing → active → past_due → canceled state machine
Covers Korea specifics: 자동갱신 7일 전 고지, 현금영수증, 청약철회

cases.prompt: Implement Stripe subscriptions with webhook handlers.

assertions.text: Handles the required webhook events (subscription created/updated/deleted, invoice.payment_failed, dispute.created)
Enforces HMAC signature verification on raw body and idempotency to prevent duplicate processing
Defaults to TEST/sandbox keys (sk_test_, 4242 test card), keeps secrets in .env, and requires user confirmation before LIVE keys
